name: chip50-survey-mcp
description: Privacy-preserving MCP server for CHIP50 survey data analysis with automatic cell suppression and protected BigQuery views
long_description:
A privacy-first Model Context Protocol server for analyzing CHIP50 survey data. Access public opinion data with automatic privacy protections built-in.

**Privacy Features:**
- **Automatic Cell Suppression**: Cells with n<10 automatically suppressed for k-anonymity
- **Geographic Aggregation**: State-level data aggregated to 5 regions
- **Protected Views**: No access to user IDs or personally identifiable information
- **Weighted Analysis**: Survey-weighted cross-tabulations for accurate population estimates

**Key Features:**
- **Variable Discovery**: Browse available demographic and survey variables
- **Flexible Crosstabs**: Generate cross-tabulations across demographics with wave filtering
- **Research-Ready**: Designed for journalists, academics, and independent researchers
- **Direct BigQuery**: Queries privacy-protected views in chip50.public dataset

**Perfect for:**
Journalists covering public opinion, academic researchers, policy analysts, and anyone studying American political attitudes.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: CHIP50 API key for authentication. For testing with synthetic data, use: chip50_test_synthetic_data_only

projectId.title: Google Cloud Project ID
projectId.description: Your Google Cloud project ID where the BigQuery data is stored

minCellSize.title: Minimum Cell Size
minCellSize.description: Minimum cell size for privacy protection (cells below this are suppressed, range: 1-100)

tools.name: get_available_variables
tools.description: Discover available demographic and survey variables in the CHIP50 dataset. Returns variable names, descriptions, scales, and privacy protection details. Use this first to explore what data is available.

tools.name: generate_crosstab
tools.description: Generate privacy-protected cross-tabulation of CHIP50 survey data. Analyzes survey responses across demographic categories with automatic cell suppression (n≥10). Supports wave filtering and weighted analysis. Returns counts, percentages, and suppression metadata.
